title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 01 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 01 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 01 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/09/2021
DCE iron ore futures fell sharply today, the main contract decreased by around 7.8% in a day. The spot quotation in the morning has increasedby 10yuan/mt over yesterday, while traders gradually lowered the quotations and accepted the bargain space, although they had bad selling mood today. PBF at Shandong port dealt 1020yuan/mt, fell by 70yuan/mt; presell PBF at Shandong port dealt 1010-1015yuan/mt, fell by 50- 55yuan/mt over yesterday.
